languages.text: Себериан полагается исключительно на свой клинок, что мешает ему услышать доводы свиты на совете. Пока клинок при нем, шансы направить ход событий в иное русло невелики.

traits.locale_text: Себериан полагается исключительно на свой клинок, что мешает ему услышать доводы свиты на совете. Пока клинок при нем, шансы направить ход событий в иное русло невелики.

languages.text: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.
languages.original_text: Себериан полагается исключительно на свой клинок, что мешает ему услышать доводы свиты на совете. Пока клинок при нем, шансы направить ход событий в иное русло невелики.

traits.locale_text: Seberian places his absolute trust in his blade alone, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

Seberian places his absolute trust in his blade alone, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

languages.text: Seberian vertraut allein seiner Klinge, doch dieser Glaube macht ihn taub für die Empfehlungen seiner Mitstreiter im Rat. Solange das Schwert an seiner Seite bleibt, besteht kaum eine Chance, die Ereignisse in eine andere Richtung zu lenken.
languages.original_text: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

traits.locale_text: Seberian vertraut allein seiner Klinge, doch dieser Glaube macht ihn taub für die Empfehlungen seiner Mitstreiter im Rat. Solange das Schwert an seiner Seite bleibt, besteht kaum eine Chance, die Ereignisse in eine andere Richtung zu lenken.

languages.text: Seberian n'a confiance qu'en son épée et reste sourd aux conseils de son entourage. Tant qu'il aura la lame, il sera presque impossible de changer le cours des événements.
languages.original_text: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

traits.locale_text: Seberian n'a confiance qu'en son épée et reste sourd aux conseils de son entourage. Tant qu'il aura la lame, il sera presque impossible de changer le cours des événements.

languages.text: 塞贝里安只信任他的剑，这种执念使他在军事议会上对随从们的建议充耳不闻。只要那把剑还在他身边，就很难改变事件原本的发展方向。
languages.original_text: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安只信任他的剑，这种执念使他在军事议会上对随从们的建议充耳不闻。只要那把剑还在他身边，就很难改变事件原本的发展方向。

languages.text: Seberian solo confía en su espada, y hace oídos sordos a los argumentos de su séquito durante el consejo. Mientras la espada permanezca a su lado, es poco probable que puedan invertirse las tornas.
languages.original_text: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

traits.locale_text: Seberian solo confía en su espada, y hace oídos sordos a los argumentos de su séquito durante el consejo. Mientras la espada permanezca a su lado, es poco probable que puedan invertirse las tornas.

languages.text: セベリアンは剣に頼りすぎており、評議会で従者の主張を聞くことができない。彼が剣を持っている限り、流れを変えるチャンスはほとんどない。
languages.original_text: Seberian relies too much on his blade, and it prevents him from hearing the arguments of his retinue at the council. As long as he has his blade, there is little chance of turning the tide.

languages.text: Seberian sadece kılıcına güveniyor. Bu inanç, konseyde maiyetinin tavsiyelerine kulaklarını tıkamasına neden oluyor. Kılıç yanında olduğu sürece olayların seyrini değiştirme şansı çok düşük.
languages.original_text: Seberian trusts only in his blade, a faith that deafens him to the counsel of his retinue during the council. While the sword remains at his side, the chances of steering events onto a different course are slim.

traits.locale_text: Seberian sadece kılıcına güveniyor. Bu inanç, konseyde maiyetinin tavsiyelerine kulaklarını tıkamasına neden oluyor. Kılıç yanında olduğu sürece olayların seyrini değiştirme şansı çok düşük.
